nano-banana.command: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; : "${MCP_ROOT:?set MCP_ROOT}"; : "${GOOGLE_API_KEY:?set GOOGLE_API_KEY}"; cd "${MCP_ROOT}/nano-banana-mcp-server" && GEMINI_API_KEY="${GOOGLE_API_KEY}" node dist/index.js'

sequential-thinking.command: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; : "${MCP_ROOT:?set MCP_ROOT}"; cd "${MCP_ROOT}/sequential-thinking-mcp-server" && node index.js'
